name: superpower4tester
description: Tester workflows for granular testcase JSON generation and Chrome DevTools MCP execution.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and execute granular testcase JSON with browser evidence
interface.longDescription: Use superpower4tester to inspect requirements and UI, generate detailed Vietnamese-first testcase.json files, execute them through Chrome DevTools MCP, and write PASS, FAIL, or PENDING results with clear comments.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this UI and design test cases.
